title: Dave Wolverton
content:
{{Top|rwp}} {{Person |image=[[File:DaveWolverton.png]] |name=Dave Wolverton |birth=[[May 15]], [[1950s#1957|1957]]
[[Wikipedia:Louisiana|Louisiana]], [[Wikipedia:New Orleans|New Orleans]], [[Wikipedia:United States|United States]]{{WebCite|url=https://locusmag.com/2022/01/dave-wolverton-1957-2022|text=Dave Wolverton (1957-2022)|date=2022-01-14|work=[https://locusmag.com Locus Publications]|archivedate=20220116100650}} |death=[[January 14]], [[2022]]
[[Wikipedia:St. George, Utah|St. George]], [[Wikipedia:Utah|Utah]], [[Wikipedia:United States|United States]] |listedpronouns= |nationality= |occupation=Author |companies= |website= }} '''Dave Wolverton''' ([[May 15]], [[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[January 14]], [[2022]]) was the author of the novel ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''. He also wrote a number of short stories, including ''[[Payback: The Tale of Dengar]]'', ''[[The Sand Tender: The Hammerhead's Tale]]'', and ''[[A Free Quarren in the Palace: Tessek's Tale]]'' for the ''[[Star Wars]]'' short-story anthologies ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]'', ''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]'' and ''[[Tales of the Bounty Hunters]]''. Wolverton also contributed to the ''[[Jedi Apprentice]]'' young-reader series, writing book one, [[Jedi Apprentice: The Rising Force|''The Rising Force'']], and co-writing book three, [[Jedi Apprentice: The Hidden Past|''The Hidden Past'']], with [[Jude Watson]]. He also wrote four of the [[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures (Scholastic)|''Episode I Adventures'']], which include ''[[Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children]]'', ''[[Episode I Adventures 6: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker]]'', ''[[Episode I Adventures 7: Capture Arawynne]]'' and ''[[Episode I Adventures 8: Trouble on Tatooine]]''. Wolverton also wrote eight books of the ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' series. {{Author-stub}} ==Bibliography== {|class="sortable" {{Prettytable}} |- bgcolor="#CCCCCC" ! Year !! Title !!
